title: String to cobwebs
description: Add a recipe: 9 of string for one of cobweb
body:
# ✅ Features

Add a recipe: 9 of string for one of cobweb

## ❓ Installation 

Put the pure data pack .zip file into the datapacks folder of your Minecraft world. 
```(%appdata%/.minecraft/saves/name of your world/datapacks)```
